cooks_apprentice.name: Cook's Apprentice
cooks_apprentice.description: The Lumbridge cook needs flour and sand for tonight's feast. Help him out.
narrative: A panicked cook stops you outside the castle kitchen. 'The Duke's feast is in a few hours and I'm out of supplies! Bring me flour and a bucket of sand — I beg you!'

dorics_errand.name: Doric's Errand
dorics_errand.description: The dwarven smith Doric is out of ore. Deliver what he needs and he'll share his forge.
narrative: Doric leans on his anvil. 'Laddie, I've run dry. Fetch me clay, copper, and iron and ye can use this forge whenever ye like.'

feathered_fortune.name: Feathered Fortune
feathered_fortune.description: A fletcher's apprentice needs chicken feathers — a LOT of them.
narrative: A twitchy fletcher shoves a basket at you. 'Feathers. Lots. Now. No questions.'

bone_voyage.name: Bone Voyage
bone_voyage.description: The monk at Edgeville monastery wants to offer a great tribute at the altar.
narrative: The elderly monk bows his head. 'Bring bones. Many bones. The Saradomin hears prayers paid in bone.'

chicken_menace.name: The Chicken Menace
chicken_menace.description: A farmer's chickens have gone feral. Thin the flock.
narrative: The farmer points a shaking finger at the coop. 'They're not chickens anymore. They're MONSTERS. Cull twenty-five.'

goblin_menace.name: The Goblin Menace
goblin_menace.description: Goblins have been raiding caravans near the crossroads. Cut them down.
narrative: A weary guardsman spits into the fire. 'Fifteen of the green wretches. Then we can get goods moving again.'

mad_cow_affair.name: The Mad Cow Affair
mad_cow_affair.description: Something in the water has driven the herd mad. Put them down for the farmer.
narrative: Blood on the grass. Hoofprints on the barn roof. The farmer doesn't even look up. 'Twenty head. Mercy killing.'

eight_legged_problem.name: An Eight-Legged Problem
eight_legged_problem.description: Giant spiders have overrun an old mineshaft. Clear them out.
narrative: Cobwebs as thick as rope. Something skitters in the dark. The mine foreman hands you a torch and a short sword. 'Ten of them. Don't look up.'

giant_problem.name: A Giant Problem
giant_problem.description: Hill giants have been smashing watchtowers in the hills. Break them before they break the kingdom.
narrative: A broken watchtower lies in splinters. Footprints the size of shields lead into the hills. The captain looks at you. 'Five. Bring me the big bones as proof.'

wizards_homework.name: The Wizard's Homework
wizards_homework.description: A wizard has lost a duel to his apprentice. Help him even the score.
narrative: The wizard's hat is singed. 'One of my own students bested me. Cull the dark wizards gathering at the stone circle — and bring me an iron bar while you're at it, for, ah… reasons.'

dragon_slayer.name: Dragon Slayer
dragon_slayer.description: Only a true hero can face a dragon. Prove yourself worthy.
narrative: Smoke over the kingdom. Villages burning. The champions' guild opens its doors to you alone. 'Bring it a shield of the ancients. Then bring us its hide.'

champion_of_champions.name: Champion of Champions
champion_of_champions.description: The champions' guild only tests those who have truly mastered combat. Reach peak form in every melee discipline.
narrative: The guildmaster looks you up and down. 'The weapon is nothing. The fighter is everything. Come back when your strength, attack, and defence each sit at 50.'
